title: Vic's Point Blank - Big Bore Content pack
description: A Content pack for Vic's Point blank, adding many powerful guns to your game
body:
![OA98, Anaconda, Grizzly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/380319ec8a854b15cec28012632b29e9bf54061e.png)
**An extension pack for Vic's Point blank, adding powerful guns to your game, with everything available in the pack being obtainable in survival.**

**DISCLAIMER:** IT'S RECOMMENDED THAT YOU USE THE LATEST VERSION OF GECKOLIB AND VIC'S POINT BLANK
As of now theres only 7 guns, but ill be adding many more guns and attachments in time.

Planned guns:

700 nitro rifle

.416 Rigby rifle

BFG 50

.950 JDJ Fat mat

.577 Tyrannosaur

# REQUIRES:

- [Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank)
- [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

# HOW TO INSTALL:
To install the pack create a folder named "pointblank" in your minecraft game folder, and put this zip file inside of the pointblank folder you created.
